home.kicker: Start a fresh conversation with a clear prompt
home.title: Chat with Holix AI
home.subtitle: Start a new chat here. Add a title first, or jump straight into your question and let the conversation take shape naturally.
home.panelDescription: Pick a model, add a title or your first message, and Holix will organize it as a new chat thread.
home.titleTipDesc: If you only enter the message, we will use a short fallback title first and refine it automatically later.
home.contentTipTitle: You can start directly with the prompt
home.contentTipDesc: A single sentence works, and so does a fuller brief with context, goals, and constraints.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your application settings here. Select a category from the sidebar to get started.

general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Manage basic application settings and behavior
general.appThemeDesc: Control the overall light or dark appearance of the application.
general.codeThemeDesc: Control the syntax highlighting style for Markdown code blocks, with matching light and dark variants.

github.label: GitHub
github.description: Clean and familiar, close to the reading experience on modern code hosting platforms.

vitesse.label: Vitesse
vitesse.description: Higher contrast and a livelier feel, great for scanning longer code snippets.

catppuccin.label: Catppuccin
catppuccin.description: Softer and moodier, better for a warmer, more atmospheric code-reading experience.

general.languageDesc: Choose the display language of the app
general.autoStartDesc: Automatically open the app when the system starts
general.minimizeToTrayDesc: Hide to system tray when clicking minimize
general.closeToTrayDesc: Hide to tray instead of quitting when clicking close
general.context7ApiKeyDesc: API key for Context7 service access, stored locally only.
general.ollamaEnabledDesc: Turn Ollama into a system-level model source. Once enabled, available models are auto-detected and become selectable in chat.
general.ollamaApiKeyPlaceholder: Optional, for reverse proxies or auth gateways
general.ollamaApiKeyDesc: Local Ollama usually does not need an API key. Fill this only when your Ollama endpoint is behind an auth layer.
general.ollamaIdleStatus: After enabling Ollama, settings are auto-saved and models are discovered automatically.
general.ollamaDetectingStatus: Connecting to Ollama and detecting models...
general.ollamaReadyStatus: Ollama is ready with {{count}} detected models.
general.ollamaDisabledStatus: Ollama is disabled and will not appear in chat model selection.
general.showNotificationsDesc: Receive system messages and tip notifications
general.clearCacheDesc: Clear app cache to free disk space
general.resetAppDesc: Restore all settings to default. This action cannot be undone

provider.title: AI Provider Configuration
provider.description: Configure and manage your AI model providers
provider.ollamaDetectHint: When using Ollama, available models are auto-detected from the Base URL, and you can refresh them manually.
provider.ollamaApiKeyHint: Local Ollama usually does not require an API key, so this can stay empty.
provider.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.

addDialog.title: Add New Provider
addDialog.avatarPlaceholder: Enter emoji, image URL, or Data URL
addDialog.avatarHelp: Upload your own image or choose one of the built-in avatar presets below.

provider.temperatureDescription: Global default used by chats for this provider unless the chat overrides it.
provider.maxTokensDescription: Global default maximum output tokens used by chats for this provider unless overridden.
provider.apiTypeDescription: Select the API format used by this provider. This ensures correct API calls.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: View all loaded Skills with their tool capabilities and permission configurations.

install.title: Install Skills from GitHub
install.description: Supports repository URL (e.g. https://github.com/antfu/skills) or owner/repo (e.g. antfu/skills). Also supports scanning skill description files from other products (e.g. SKILL.md / AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md), and automatically reads compatible skills from local directories (e.g. ~/.claude/skills). View skill details below.
install.errorNoRepo: Please enter a GitHub repository address first

update.title: Application Update
update.description: Check and get the latest version of the app
update.upToDate: You are already on the latest version.
update.loadError: Failed to load release notes. Please check your network connection.

toast.upToDate: You are already on the latest version!
toast.downloadComplete: Update downloaded successfully. You can install it now.

devTools.title: Developer Tools
devTools.description: Open developer tools for debugging and inspecting the app

fonts.title: Open Source Font Credits
fonts.description: This app uses the following open source fonts. Thanks to the authors for their contributions.
fonts.interDescription: A modern variable sans-serif typeface optimized for screen readability

mcp.title: MCP Configuration
mcp.description: Configure MCP servers using Cursor-compatible JSON format.
mcp.hint: Use Cursor format: { "mcpServers": { "name": { "command": "...", "args": [] } } }. Use "url" for HTTP transport; add "disabled": true to disable a server.

workspace.empty: No workspace items yet. Add files or folders below.

settingsPanel.managementDescription: Manage the current conversation title, expiration strategy, and key actions in one place.
settingsPanel.renameDescription: Give it a clearer name so you can return to it quickly from the sidebar.
settingsPanel.expiryPopoverDescription: Choose a specific date and time, or keep this conversation forever.
settingsPanel.expirySummary: Once expired, this conversation will become inactive based on the current policy; if you leave it unset, it stays available.
settingsPanel.deleteDescription: This removes the conversation, its messages, and related state. This action cannot be undone.
settingsPanel.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation and all of its messages? This action cannot be undone.
settingsPanel.contextRulesDescription: Control how much historical context is automatically included with each question.
settingsPanel.modelOverridesDescription: These values apply only to the current conversation and override the provider defaults when set.
settingsPanel.temperatureHint: Leave empty to follow the provider default. Valid range: 0 to 2.
settingsPanel.maxTokensHint: Leave empty to follow the provider default. Use a positive integer.
settingsPanel.maxMessagesHint: Read at most the most recent N messages for each request (1-200).
settingsPanel.timeWindowHint: Only include messages within the selected time window, or allow all time.
settingsPanel.autoScrollDescription: After sending a new message, the chat list automatically scrolls to the latest reply.
settingsPanel.skillsTitle: Conversation Skills overrides (higher priority than global)
settingsPanel.skillsDescription: Override the global skill enablement state for this conversation only.
settingsPanel.maxMessagesInvalid: Message count must be an integer between 1 and 200
settingsPanel.temperatureInvalid: Temperature must be a number between 0 and 2
settingsPanel.maxTokensInvalid: Max tokens must be a positive integer

skillsPage.title: Skills
skillsPage.description: Manage installed skills and the skill store in one place.

importExternal.title: Import External Skills
importExternal.description: Copy skills from other AI tools into the current .holixai/skills directory.
importExternal.placeholder: Select a skills directory to import
importExternal.empty: No external skills directories were detected.

store.title: Skill Store
store.description: Browse and install skills you need. This is currently a simple store sample page.

writing.name: Writing Assistant
writing.desc: Improve copywriting, expand drafts, and polish tone for everyday writing.

data.name: Data Analyst
data.desc: Quickly generate analysis ideas, summarize conclusions, and suggest actions.

frontend.name: Frontend Helper
frontend.desc: Assist with component development, styling, and page structure optimization.

agents.title: Agent
agents.description: Create and tune your custom agents.

form.title: Create Agent
form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What this agent is for, and how it should help.
form.promptPlaceholder: Define the role, constraints, response style, and execution rules.
form.skillsPlaceholder: Select skills (names only to keep selector compact)
form.mapHint: Use JSON for capability tuning weights, for example planning/reasoning/toolUse.
form.dialogDescription: Configure name, prompt, skills and MAP tuning for this agent.
form.noMcpHint: No MCP servers available. Configure MCP in settings first.

list.title: Created Agents
list.emptyCustom: No custom agents yet. Click "Create Agent" to add one.

prompt.empty: No prompts yet. Add one below.

dialog.description: Add the prompt content for this conversation

message.previewFailed: Failed to open window, please check system settings
message.noExportableContent: This message has no exportable content

selector.noAvailableProviderModel: Enable at least one provider with supported models in Settings first

preview.title: Message Preview
preview.noMessages: No message content available for preview.

search.inputPlaceholder: Type a command or search messages...
